text.title: django-base-model Decision Tree
text.summary: Per-model routing through soft-delete, tenant, uid exposure decisions.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this model represent durable user/business data where an "undo" or compliance retention is required?

branch.question: Is this model row-isolated per tenant in a multi-tenant SaaS?

branch.conclusion: extends="TenantAwareSoftDeletableModel". All Celery/management access wraps in tenant_context(). Partial unique constraints scope to (tenant, field).
extends="SoftDeletableModel". Convert every unique=True into a partial UniqueConstraint.

branch.question: Does the model surface in a public API where exposing auto-increment ids is a leak?

branch.conclusion: extends="BaseModel" (TimestampMixin + UidMixin). Expose `uid` in API responses; never expose `id`.
extends="BaseModel" with TimestampMixin only. uid optional.

text.example: model=Customer, soft-delete required, single-tenant, public API exposure q-needs-soft-delete -> true q-multi-tenant -> false => conclusion r3-partial-unique-under-soft-delete: SoftDeletableModel + partial unique on email.
